## Checklist

- [ ] I used a clear conventional commit message.
- [ ] I ran `mvn test` locally.
- [ ] I checked `git diff` before committing.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, private keys, or real customer data.
- [ ] I updated docs or labs when behavior changed.
